creator: conrads@cox.net
text:
On Mon, 19 Mar 2012 15:07:08 -0500
"Conrad J. Sabatier" <conrads@cox.net> wrote:

> On Mon, 19 Mar 2012 12:34:24 +0600
> Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com> wrote:
> 
> > Hi,
> > 
> > Can you please send an updated patch? Seems like you are running an
> > old CVS ports repository or maybe not. As my update was committed on
> > 18th instant.
> > 
> > Regards,
> > Muhammad
> > 
> > On Mon, Mar 19, 2012 at 8:20 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org>
> > wrote:
> > 
> > > Maintainer of shells/ch,
> > >
> > > Please note that PR ports/166232 has just been submitted.
> > >
> > > If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> > > you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the
> > > patch and a committer will take care of it.
> > >
> > > The full text of the PR can be found at:
> > >    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/166232
> > >
> > > --
> > > Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> > > edwin@FreeBSD.org
> > >
> 
> Sorry, first patch was messed up.  Here's the corrected one (I also
> left you as the MAINTAINER in this one).
> 
> Conrad
> 

Muhammad, perhaps you can figure out what's wrong with the plist.  I'm
exhausted at the moment.

Thanks!


-- 
Conrad J. Sabatier
